meaning: n.[宗]利亚(雅各最初的妻子)
examples: Leah is coming on very well now and it's a matter of deciding how to fit her into the team.
What advice would Leah give you to move you ahead on your journey?
By naming her fears and facing them head-on, Leah gained confidence.
At the memorial service, Jessica Clank(ph) and Leah Coin(ph) recited a poem about their friend.
Leah and McGuffin were washing his car and horsing around with a wet sponge.
